reviews.review_description: The last time a play the vr game was fun but when the new update came i stop bc I didn't like it but i want to bring that og map and the monster

I remember Squido being this cool VR dev team that made no more rainbows and I was so excited to see the new projects they would make, but now they are just releasing pure slop. Truthfully, I believe that Squido should take a break from releasing slop and actually make a game that is as high quality as no more rainbows.

this game was a lot of fun what doesn't work anymore they have a new game but it doesn't work i wrote it one star it was just stuck in frozen on the other game maybe you'll get stuck for you probably not well i love momentum it was so fun and scary mean some other people used to hide when we spawn in.
So i download the game i was at the start i went to the portal but it didn't work :( 2 star
It's so dead bro I got it and it looked like it was going to have some people but no this game is dead

The game and its concept is good and really enjoyable, however the game is full of tons of bugs and problems! 

It’s really hard to locate players when you are the null due to the map being really big and having multiple floors.

sometimes when you are null certain parts of the map turn completely black and make it really hard to see, this can also occurs for players too but it’s really rare.

Sometimes when a round ends the game bugs and constantly respawns you causing you to have to restart your game. 

It’s also hard to locate servers that have a lot of people in them. 

Also the hands are really hard to move with and can be really hard to move around with. 

The creators should pay attention to this game more since it is better than their other main game digi gods in my opinion of course. 

It’s also hard to understand stand the monster since the voice changer is really deep and is muffled by the sound track the monster emits when he is near.
when i join in the game i just see a black screen i cant  load in

The monsters didn’t really show up, but it was OK but it took a while we didn’t notice but then we noticed the monsters were coming so we ran and then I got jump. Scared the game is really fun. I found it fun. You’re really fun game pretty awesome ￼
I like  si game  monkey  and  gorilla tag

Does not make it good, sure it just came out but the servers are laggy and don’t even let you in, multiple glitches and an og badge for 20 bucks? The movement is janky, the game is boring and overall nothing to do so if your looking for a horror game for free with this type of movement there are other options for example, big scary, scary baboon, animal company, spooky monkeh, fearing gorilla.

reviews.review_title: I think this game is great
reviews.review_description: Squido studio you are the best

i love killing people as the monster, or teaming with them

messing around in this game is funny

this game is super fun

Those who say that it has bugs are forgetting how an early access game works, a mod said that if your game lags and you become invisible, it just means that servers are full. Overall, it’s an overall fun game and obviously is better then games like scary baboon and other lethal ape copies.👍
The game was amazing. It was really fun
It’s a very fun game
This was the best horror game I’ve played on VR so far and it’s really fun and scary at the same time.

This is a good game movement isn't terrible, monsters don't freeze and then come back, monsters actually roam instead of camping In a certain spot, so overall it is good but there are some bugs like buttons not appearing after rejoining a public server so yeah that's about it smoonky.

This is one of the first games that has actually scared me in a while, I’ve been waiting for this game to come out for so long and it’s finally here. I recommend

This game is for people who really like scary games now honestly this is an honest review because these are also the creators of you guys and this really means a lot because did you guys never knew they would create a game? That’s so scary and it really impressed me and it’s really a realistic, not only realistic, but kind of reminds me of back rooms and it’s kind of funny in someway because people are really funny in this game Even if you’re really scared some way to make it funny this game is definitely for others even if you’re not brave I think you should definitely get this game and this game is just awesome for any anyone anyone it reminds me of gorilla tag and did you guys did you go out because I mean it’s made by the same developer and the reason it reminds me of tag because it has three fingers on each hands and you have to crawl away from that monster and you are a monkey. You can also get these things called a shiny rock and gorilla tag and you can also get 100 of shiny rocks per day in gorilla tag but in this game, you could also get 100 of those coins like those energy coins and which really is cool in my opinion so this game is very awesome and thank you guys for making it ￼
